name: Easy Borscht Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Cabbage, cut fine in strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large pot. Add the onion and sauté until softened.
2. Add the beets and cabbage; stir often and cook for about 5 minutes.
3. Add the tomatoes, vinegar, sugar, parsley, bay leaf, vegetable broth, salt, and pepper.
4. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cover. Cook until all vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally (about 30-40 minutes).
5. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Remove the parsley stems and bay leaf.
6. Serve hot in bowls or mugs. Top each serving with a dollop of sour cream and sprinkle with chopped dill.
